name: Ellen's Veggie Quiche
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 375 degrees.
2. Grate zucchini and carrots and place them in the bottom of the pie pan.
3. In a bowl, beat eggs, cream, salt, and pepper until well combined.
4. Grate cheese into the egg mixture.
5. Pour the egg and cheese mixture over the grated vegetables in the pie pan.
6. Bake for 40-60 minutes or until set.
